mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COM_DEPT ( DEPTCD, FACTORYCD, PAR_DEPTCD, DEPTNM, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM ) VALUES ( #{DEPTCD}, #{FACTORYCD}, #{PAR_DEPTCD}, #{DEPTNM}, #{USEYN}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE() )
mapper.delete: UPDATE TBL_COM_DEPT SET USEYN = 0, EDITDTM = GETDATE() WHERE DEPTCD = #{DEPTCD}
